title: [InstSimplify][InstCombine][ConstantFold] Move vector div/rem by zero fold to InstCombine

tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary mentions srem extension but existing tests only cover urem; this tests signed remainder with zero divisor vector folding to poison
Code checks for UndefValue explicitly but existing tests only demonstrate zero elements; this tests undef element detection
Existing tests use <2 x> vectors with i8/i32; this tests <4 x i16> wider vector type with zero in middle element position
